tasks.subject: Task 1: Pure ranking.py module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement rank_stations — group per station, aggregate (min/max/mean), stable sort, limit.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/ranking.py, tests/test_ranking.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/ranking.py", "tests/test_ranking.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_ranking.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rank_stations returns station_id/value/count", "min/max/mean correct", "asc/desc + stable ties", "limit incl 0=all", "null drop + count", "empty/all-null -> empty"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: rank CLI command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the smoke-sense rank Typer command and register it in bin/__init__.py.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/bin/rank.py, src/smoke_sense/bin/__init__.py, tests/test_rank_cli.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/bin/rank.py", "src/smoke_sense/bin/__init__.py", "tests/test_rank_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["table default desc/limit10", "json shape metric/by/agg/order/stations", "--asc reverses, --limit, bad --agg nonzero", "--exclude-station drops", "multi-county + no-data message"]}
```
